title: Move item when subitems have either one of two status's?
excerpt: I’m trying to set up an automation that changes the overall item’s status to complete when the sub items have either one of the possible status updates of “Complete or N/A”. I see a way to set up the automation so that i…

posts.author: MariannaC (Marianna Cortez)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to set up an automation that changes the overall item’s status to complete when the sub items have either one of the possible status updates of “Complete or N/A”. I see a way to set up the automation so that if all of the sub items have just one status such as “complete” then it will change the item’s status to complete but is there a way to set it up to be an X or Y substatus?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MariannaC,

I’m afraid it’s not really clear what you’re looking for. Would you mind adding an example?

posts.author: MariannaC (Marianna Cortez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Fantasy Media Team,

I have a list of subitems that populate everytime I create an item. What i’m looking for is if i change all of my subitem’s status to either “complete” OR “N/A”, then change the overall status of the item to “complete” but as it seems to be now, all of the subitems need to be “complete”. I can’t have this or that as an option
